commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: And. Hebrew, "But if thou wilt go, do; be strong; (he speaks ironically) God "Septuagint, "if thou thinkest that thou art strong with these, the Lord "Amasias ought to have known that no dependance was to be placed on Israel, while they despised God, chap. xv. 2.
